name: Minoxidil Topical Solution USP 10%
about: Minoxidil Topical Solution USP 10% is a highly effective hair restore solution that helps in regrowing hair. This solution is recommended for those who are experiencing hair loss or thinning. It is a solid dosage form that comes from India. The product is stored in a dry place to ensure its quality remains intact. This solution works by increasing blood flow to the hair follicles and revitalizing them. It is a clinically proven solution that has been used by millions of people around the world. It is easy to use and comes with clear instructions on how to apply it.

faq.q: How often should I use Minoxidil Topical Solution USP 10%?
faq.a: The recommended usage is twice a day, once in the morning and once at night.

faq.q: How long will it take to see results?
faq.a: Results may vary from person to person, but it usually takes around 2-4 months to see significant results.

faq.q: Can this solution be used by both men and women?
faq.a: Yes, this solution is suitable for both men and women.

faq.q: Is there any side effect of using this solution?
faq.a: Some people may experience mild side effects such as itching, redness, or dryness of the scalp. However, these side effects usually go away on their own.

faq.q: Can I use this solution if I have a sensitive scalp?
faq.a: It is recommended to consult with a doctor before using this solution if you have a sensitive scalp.
